data.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause (verified empirically): bash-runner.sh does not export CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, so when tests cd into temp git repos and invoke the dso shim, plugin-root resolution fails silently (stderr suppressed by hook). run-hook-tests.sh exports CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (line 31); bash-runner.sh does not. Confirmed: setting CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT before bash test execution makes the 3 failing tests pass (13 pass / 0 fail).
